div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:
This implementation guide is a FHIR IG rendering of the KBS Map Set from VA sources (primarily VistA) to FHIR. Where appropriate these maps conform to the us-core profiles.

title.value: US Veterans Administration FHIR Map Set Implementation Guide

description.value: This implementation guide is a FHIR IG rendering of the KBS Map Set from VA sources (primarily VistA) to FHIR. Where appropriate these maps conform to the us-core profiles.

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA PATIENT ALLERGIES (file 120.8) to FHIR AllergyIntolerance
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA APPOINTMENT (file 2.98) to FHIR Appointment
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA V POV (file 9000010.07) to FHIR Condition
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA PROBLEM (file 9000011) to FHIR Condition
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA ? (file ?) to FHIR DiagnosticReport

name.value: Diagnostic Report for Lab: Chem, hem, tox, ria, ser {DiagnosticReport}

description.value: This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA CHEM, HEM, TOX, RIA, SER, etc. (file 63.04) to FHIR DiagnosticReport
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA CYTOPATHOLOGY (file 63.09) to FHIR DiagnosticReport

name.value: Diagnostic Report for Lab: Electron Microscopy {DiagnosticReport}

description.value: This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA EM (file 63.02) to FHIR DiagnosticReport
This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA MICROBIOLOGY (file 63.05) to FHIR DiagnosticReport

name.value: Diagnostic Report for Lab: Surgical Pathology {DiagnosticReport}

description.value: This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA SURGICAL PATHOLOGY (file 63.08) to FHIR DiagnosticReport
